title: Energy investors go stock picking, benefiting Chevron over Exxon
author: Claudia Assis
fullText: Disruption to global energy supplies and the prospect of an ever-widening conflict in the Middle East has sent crude-oil and natural-gas futures higher — and exposed subtle differences on how investors treat the stocks of different energy companies.
summary: Disruption to global energy supplies and the prospect of an ever-widening conflict in the Middle East has sent crude-oil and natural-gas futures higher — and exposed subtle differences on how investors treat the stocks of different energy companies.
